items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social/environmental factors) and corresponding measures (PROMs) was developed for pediatric physical therapy through focus groups, interviews, a scoping review, and expert panel assessment.
items.curatedReason: 这份 PROMs 核心集为儿科物理治疗提供了一套标准化、适合日常实践的患者报告结局测量工具。它能帮助你更好地在临床、研究和质量评估中捕捉儿童患者及其家长的真实需求和感受，提升以患者为中心的护理水平。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 通过焦点小组、访谈、范围界定综述和专家小组评估，儿科物理治疗开发了一套包含九个患者报告结局（PROs）的核心集，分为三个领域（功能、总体幸福感和社会/环境因素），并包含相应的测量工具（PROMs）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This core set of PROMs provides a standardized, practice-ready collection of patient-reported outcome measures for pediatric physical therapy. It will help you better capture the real needs and perceptions of child patients and their parents in clinical practice, research, and quality assessment, enhancing patient-centered care.
items.limitation: PROs 和 PROMs 的选择过程涉及专家共识和问卷调查，可能存在主观性，且尚未在实际临床中进行广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The selection process for PROs and PROMs involved expert consensus and surveys, which may introduce subjectivity, and the set has not yet been widely validated in clinical practice.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review comparing upper limb rehabilitation strategies in chronic stroke patients with and without contralateral C7 nerve transfer identified significant evidence gaps regarding rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models between technology-assisted rehabilitation and CC7 studies.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后上肢功能障碍的康复路径分化为神经转移手术和高剂量康复两种。这份系统综述强调了目前缺乏直接比较这两种策略康复方案和结果的证据，提示你需要关注这两种途径在剂量、内容和交付模式上的差异。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项关于伴有和不伴有神经转移患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项比较慢性卒中患者（伴有和不伴有对侧 C7 神经转移）上肢康复策略的系统综述，发现了技术辅助康复与 CC7 研究之间在康复剂量、内容和交付模式方面存在显著证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: Rehabilitation pathways for post-stroke upper limb dysfunction diverge into nerve transfer surgery and high-dose rehabilitation. This systematic review highlights the current lack of direct comparative evidence for these two strategies' rehabilitation protocols and outcomes, suggesting you should pay attention to differences in dose, content, and delivery models across these two approaches.
items.limitation: 系统综述指出证据存在空白，未能提供神经转移与技术辅助康复方案之间直接比较的实证结果。
items.limitationEn: The systematic review identifies gaps in evidence and does not provide empirical results for direct comparisons between nerve transfer and technology-assisted rehabilitation protocols.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multi-method summit-Delphi consensus process involving 83 participants from seven governing bodies of tennis and the broader ecosystem generated recommendations for mental healthcare provision and wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors.
items.curatedReason: 通过多方共识，网球界对精英运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和促进制定了建议。这些建议能指导你如何在网球康复中融入更全面的心理健康支持，而不只是局限于身体层面。
items.titleZh: 网球运动中的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及网球七大管理机构及更广泛生态系统 83 名参与者的多方法峰会-德尔菲共识流程，为精英网球运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和健康促进制定了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: Through multi-stakeholder consensus, the tennis community has developed recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite athletes (including juniors). These recommendations can guide you in integrating more comprehensive mental health support into tennis rehabilitation, beyond just physical aspects.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients in a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital found that musculoskeletal disorders were predominantly managed in females (5:1 ratio) with a mean age of 47.8 ± 25.7 years, providing local insights into prevalence, patterns, and costs of physiotherapy-managed cases.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的十年回顾性研究为当地肌肉骨骼疾病的物理治疗实践提供了基线数据，但跨文化普适性有限。其主要价值在于为非洲地区康复服务规划提供了背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病：患病率、模式、治疗结果及成本
items.summaryZh: 一项针对尼日利亚大学教学医院 1582 名患者的十年回顾性研究发现，肌肉骨骼疾病主要发生在女性（男女比例 5:1），平均年龄 47.8 ± 25.7 岁，为了解当地物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式和成本提供了数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study from Nigeria offers baseline data on physiotherapy practice for musculoskeletal disorders in the region, but its cross-cultural generalizability is limited. Its primary value lies in providing contextual information for rehabilitation service planning in Africa.
items.limitation: 研究为单一中心的回顾性数据分析，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题，且仅限于尼日利亚一地，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center retrospective study, which may have selection bias and data completeness issues, and its findings are limited to Nigeria, thus generalizability is restricted.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial argues for proactive organizational leadership in athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive crisis management to establish foundational support and preventative strategies, given that up to one-third of elite athletes report mental health symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 运动员心理健康需要组织层面的领导力，不能只在危机时才介入。你应该推动你的运动组织或团队建立更积极的预防策略，而非仅仅事后治疗。
items.titleZh: 奠定基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论主张运动员心理健康需要积极的组织领导力，超越被动的危机管理，建立基础支持和预防策略，鉴于高达三分之一的精英运动员报告有心理健康症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: Athlete mental health requires organizational leadership, not just reactive interventions during crises. You should advocate for your sports organization or team to establish more proactive prevention strategies rather than merely post-hoc treatment.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This N-of-1 trial protocol outlines an mHealth intervention using an ABA' design to promote physical activity and nutrition in older cancer patients (≥ 70 years). It integrates ecological momentary assessment with accelerometry to improve health behaviors over an 8-week intervention phase.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，目前还只是方案阶段，并不能提供任何干预效果的证据。它提示我们，未来在老年癌症患者的健康行为干预中，可以探索结合移动健康和个体化设计的潜力。但请注意，在结果发布前，不要对此抱有过高期待。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者身体活动和营养的移动健康干预：N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 该 N-of-1 试验方案旨在通过 ABA' 设计的移动健康干预，促进老年癌症患者（≥ 70 岁）的身体活动和营养。它将生态瞬时评估与加速度计相结合，在 8 周干预期内改善健康行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is just an N-of-1 trial protocol, offering no evidence of intervention effectiveness yet. It hints at the potential for mHealth and individualized designs in future health behavior interventions for older cancer patients. However, temper your expectations until results are actually published.
items.limitation: 本研究为一项 N-of-1 试验方案，尚未产生实际研究结果，其方法学设计可能因个体差异而存在局限。
items.limitationEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol and has not yet produced actual research results. Its methodological design may have limitations due to individual variability.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients (5417 assessments) demonstrated that even incomplete cognitive assessments can yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables, supporting group-level stratification.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究提醒我们，卒中后康复中的认知评估常不完整。即便数据不全，你仍可从现有神经心理学数据中提取有临床意义的认知-临床关系，并支持分层管理。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名急性期后卒中患者（5417 次评估）进行的回顾性队列研究表明，即使认知评估不完整，仍能从常规神经心理学数据中提取出具有临床可解释性的认知、临床和情境变量之间的关系，并支持进行群体分层。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study highlights that cognitive assessments in post-stroke rehabilitation are often incomplete. Even with incomplete data, you can still extract clinically interpretable cognitive-clinical relationships from routine neuropsychological data and support group-level stratification.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，数据收集可能不一致，且结果可能受到未测量混杂因素的影响。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, data collection may be inconsistent, and results may be affected by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability who found exercise therapy effectively facilitated by figure-of-eight taping, addressing discomfort, pain, and clicking sensation.
items.curatedReason: 对于多向性肩关节不稳，八字形贴扎可能是一种辅助手段，帮助患者更好地进行运动疗法。但这是单病例报告，别把它的效用放大。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复训练治疗学龄空手道女运动员多向性肩关节不稳一例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告描述了一名 12 岁空手道女运动员的多向性肩关节不稳，通过八字形贴扎联合运动疗法，有效改善了不适、疼痛和弹响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Figure-of-eight taping might be a useful adjunct for multidirectional shoulder instability, facilitating exercise therapy. However, this is a single case report, so avoid overstating its efficacy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，其结果无法外推至其他患者群体，需要更多高质量研究验证其有效性。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report, and its findings cannot be generalized to other patient populations. More high-quality research is needed to validate its effectiveness.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries found that mandatory bundled payment for lower extremity joint replacement significantly affected the delivery of preoperative rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 针对美国Medicare 62,217名受益人的分析显示，强制性下肢关节置换打包支付模式，确实显著影响了术前康复（prehabilitation）的提供。如果你在美国执业，必须认识到这种支付政策对你提供术前康复服务的直接限制，并需调整服务模式以适应报销变化。
items.titleZh: 强制性打包支付对下肢关节置换术前康复提供的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项对 62,217 名 Medicare 受益人的双重差分分析发现，强制性下肢关节置换打包支付对术前康复服务的提供产生了显著影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of 62,217 Medicare beneficiaries in the US confirms that mandatory bundled payments for lower extremity joint replacement significantly impacted prehabilitation delivery. If you practice in the US, you must acknowledge this direct limitation on your ability to provide prehabilitation services and adjust your practice model to align with reimbursement changes.
items.limitation: 本研究基于医疗保险索赔数据，可能无法捕捉到所有术前康复的非报销形式或非 Medicare 患者群体。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on Medicare claims data and may not capture all forms of non-reimbursed prehabilitation or non-Medicare patient populations.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement
